headline.purpose: Section titles (.section-title), opens every major page section.

title.purpose: Service/feature card titles (.svc-title); deliberately restrained size.

label.purpose: Nav sub-tagline and form-section labels only — not a decorative eyebrow.

shadows.name: ambient-md
shadows.purpose: Resting state for portfolio site-preview cards.

shadows.name: ambient-lg
shadows.purpose: Hover/lifted state for portfolio site-preview cards.

motion.name: ease-signature
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions site-wide.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button, solid Signal Blue, used sitewide for the single highest-priority action.
components.html: Get My Free Strategy Call
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 16px 30px; background: #2255d5; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1241c1; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary .ds-btn-icon { transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-icon { transform: translateX(3px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #74acff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outline button for the lower-priority action alongside a primary CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 16px 28px; background: transparent; color: #10141b; font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; border: 1.5px solid #b2b8c1; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #2255d5; background: rgba(34,85,213,0.06); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #2255d5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Portfolio Preview Card
components.description: Live-site preview card with browser-chrome header; shadow present at rest, lifts on hover. The system's one 'physical object' card.
components.css: .ds-site-card { text-decoration: none; display: block; color: inherit; } .ds-site-frame { border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; background: #080d16; box-shadow: 0 14px 36px oklch(20% 0.02 260 / 0.12); transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-site-card:hover .ds-site-frame { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 28px 72px oklch(20% 0.02 260 / 0.20); } .ds-site-chrome { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 12px 14px; } .ds-site-chrome span { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #48566c; } .ds-site-frame img { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; aspect-ratio: 16/10; object-fit: cover; object-position: top; }

components.name: Case Study Card
components.description: Flat, full-bleed Ledger Black block for client results — no shadow by design. Big Cabinet-Grotesk metrics with Signal-Blue-Light highlighted digits.
components.html:
Client Results
Attaboy Lawn Care
130
New paying clients in 90 days
components.css: .ds-case-card { background: #080d16; border-radius: 26px; padding: 44px 44px 40px; } .ds-case-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #74acff; margin-bottom: 26px; } .ds-case-client { font-family: 'Cabinet Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(24px,3.2vw,34px); font-weight: 800; color: #eff2f7; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 34px; } .ds-case-metrics { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 1px; background: rgba(72,86,108,0.16); border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-cs-metric { padding: 24px 16px; background: #080d16; } .ds-cs-metric-number { font-family: 'Cabinet Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(26px,3.5vw,40px); font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; color: #eff2f7; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-cs-metric-number span { color: #74acff; } .ds-cs-metric-label { font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #5f6a7b; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field, used in the multi-step intake modal.
components.css: .ds-form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-form-group label { font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #10141b; } .ds-form-group input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1.5px solid #b2b8c1; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #10141b; background: #ffffff; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); outline: none; } .ds-form-group input:focus { border-color: #2255d5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(34,85,213,0.14); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed Ledger Black nav with stacked Cabinet Grotesk wordmark + Signal-Blue-Light uppercase tagline.
components.html:
War-BuckMarketing
ServicesResults
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 18px 40px; background: #080d16; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(72,86,108,0.16); } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-brand-main { font-family: 'Cabinet Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 19px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #eff2f7; } .ds-nav-brand-sub { font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #74acff; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 30px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #9da5b1; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #eff2f7; }

components.name: OG Growth Panel
components.description: Signature results motif introduced 2026-07-03 in the redesigned social share image: an asymmetric Signal-Blue panel with ascending bars, symbolizing client growth. Candidate for reuse in future ad creative / social templates.
components.css: .ds-growth-panel { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 16px; height: 200px; padding: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2255d5, #12409e); border-radius: 14px; } .ds-growth-bar { width: 32px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; }

narrative.overview: War-Buck Marketing's interface reads like the private ledger of an operator who's actually closing deals, not a SaaS company's marketing deck. The canvas is near-black — Ledger Black (#080d16), not a "dark mode" gray — because the brand personality is a serious operator, not a scrappy freelancer and not a faceless corporate SaaS vendor. Against that black, exactly one color is allowed to matter: Signal Blue (#2255d5), used decisively wherever there's a number, a result, or a call to act. Everything else is near-black ink, off-white paper, or quiet gray text — no secondary or tertiary accent colors competing for attention. This system explicitly rejects the pastel-blue, light-background, icon-in-rounded-box "corporate SaaS" register the site shipped with before its 2026-07-02 redesign.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black canvas as the default surface for high-stakes sections (nav, hero, case studies, mobile menu), not just a dark-mode toggle
One saturated blue (Signal Blue) carries every accent, CTA, and highlighted number — never diluted into a pastel tint
Cabinet Grotesk (extra-bold, tight tracking) for anything that needs to command attention; Switzer for everything read at length
Proof-first layout: real client numbers and case-study metrics get the same typographic weight as headlines, because results are the pitch
Soft, colored (never pure-black) ambient shadows — depth reads as considered, not heavy

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue is the only saturated color anywhere in the system. If a new element needs emphasis, it gets Signal Blue, weight, or size — never a second accent hue.

rules.name: The Warmth-Free Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every "white" and "black" in this system is tinted toward the brand's own hue (258–264°), never toward cream/warm neutrals.

rules.name: The No-Shout Rule
rules.body: Display text never exceeds clamp(2.75rem, 6vw, 5rem) (~80px). This was deliberately reduced site-wide on 2026-07-02 after oversized headings read as "shouting."

rules.name: The Functional Uppercase Rule
rules.body: Uppercase, letter-spaced text is reserved for two specific functional roles (nav sub-label, form-section labels) — never used as a decorative kicker above every section heading.

rules.name: The Ink-Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: No shadow in this system is pure black. Every shadow is oklch(20% 0.02 260 / alpha) — a near-black tinted toward the brand's own hue.

dos: Do keep Signal Blue (#2255d5) as the only saturated accent color anywhere on the site, including in any new marketing assets (social cards, ads, email headers).
Do tint every "neutral" black/white toward the brand's own hue (258–264°) rather than defaulting to pure black/white or a warm cream.
Do lead with concrete numbers (client counts, days-to-result, revenue figures) at full typographic weight — proof is the design, not a footnote.
Do use the ink-tinted shadow formula (oklch(20% 0.02 260 / alpha)) for any new shadow, never a flat rgba(0,0,0,...).
Do cap display type at clamp(2.75rem, 6vw, 5rem) — this was deliberately reduced site-wide on 2026-07-02 after oversized headings read as "shouting."
donts: Don't revert to the pre-2026-07-02 look: light blue/white pastel gradients, rounded icon-in-a-box service cards, pastel badges, or a tiny uppercase tracked kicker above every section.
Don't introduce a second accent color. If something needs more emphasis than Signal Blue gives it, increase weight or size instead.
Don't use border-left/border-right as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't apply background-clip: text gradient text anywhere.
Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section heading.
Don't give Ledger Black surfaces (case-cards, nav, mobile menu) a drop shadow — they're flat, full-bleed ink blocks by design.
